title: Enzymatic PCR Cleanup Protocol (NEB #M0525)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3468m","text":"Enzymatic PCR Cleanup Protocol (NEB #M0525) uses Quick CIP; Quick CIP is a heat-labile version of calf intestinal alkaline phosphatase (CIP) purified from a recombinant source.","type":"header-four","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a4juf","text":"","type":"header-four","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1tbkb","text":"Features","type":"header-four","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2j8as","text":"Rapid and irreversible heat inactivation eliminates unwanted activity","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6q4fq","text":"Improved storage stability versus native enzyme","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3rh56","text":"Faster reaction setup (no supplemental additives like zinc required) and shorter incubation time","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ed68","text":"Flexible reaction conditions (active in any restriction enzyme buffer, no clean-up required)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"amrde","text":"Less enzyme required (high specific activity), resulting in a lower cost per reaction","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"evo1r","text":"No need for multiple phosphatases (Quick CIP removes 5′- and 3′- phosphates from DNA, RNA and dNTPs )","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"asm9q","text":"Active on unincorporated dNTPs in PCR products - improves DNA sequencing and SNP analysis","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"97l49","text":"Recombinant for purity, consistency and value","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4b4kc","text":"Please see SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for hazards and safety warnings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Add 1 µL of Quick CIP ( NEB #M0525 ) to 5 µL of PCR product. Note that 0.5 μl of Exo I ( NEB #M0293 ) and 1 μl of rSAP ( NEB #M0371 ) can be used in the same volume.
Incubate the mix at the 37 °C for 00:15:00 .
PCR products are ready for downstream application.
creator: New England   Biolabs
